price: Sie sagten: „Kein Schaden! Wir werden ganz gewiß zu unserem Herrn zurückkehren.
arabic: قَالُواْ لَا ضَيۡرَۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: qālū lā ḍayra innā ilā rabbinā munqalibūna
